insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new ones should not use this hook.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook in new checkout UI extensions and update existing ones to use alternative methods. The deprecation does not immediately break existing extensions, but it's essential to plan for the change to ensure future compatibility. Review the Checkout UI extensions documentation for updated guidance on intercepting the buyer's journey.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will not experience immediate changes, but they may notice updates in how checkout UI extensions function as developers adapt to the deprecation.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is crucial for maintaining a smooth and secure checkout experience. It prompts developers to update their extensions, ensuring they align with the latest best practices and security standards.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today

updates.summary: The CLI has been updated to version 4.5.0, which includes unhiding store commands for public release.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires FixedAmount line item discounts to represent per-unit discounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows server-side code to handle breaking changes to action configurations, reducing the likelihood of workflow failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates action runtime URLs, ensuring that workflows use the latest URL after app redeployment.
The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0, which includes dependency updates and bug fixes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The App Store Requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer Account API has removed the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the associated Checkout type subtree as of version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing apps to encounter Markets configured with country-subdivision regions.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill as of API version 2026-10.

recap.headline: Shopify updates CLI, App Pricing, and APIs, with deadlines for POS UI extensions and Customer Account API changes

themes.title: API and CLI updates
themes.detail: The Shopify CLI has been updated to version 4.5.0, with changes including unhidden store commands. Additionally, the POS Extensions API now supports a background extension target, and the Customer Account API has removed the Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types in version 2026-10.

themes.title: App Pricing and Partners
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated to allow for more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events. Identity verification for Shopify Partners has also started, aiming to increase trust in the ecosystem.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and POS UI extensions
themes.detail: Shopify Flow has introduced changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and Action runtime URLs now update automatically. POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 will start using per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and adapt to Customer Account API changes
Test no-charge plans and review App Pricing updates
